JSplitButton 1.2-SNAPSHOT API

Simple implementation of a split button in Java Swing.

See: Description

Packages 
Package Description
com.alexandriasoftware.swing
Swing implementation of a split button and JavaBean information for using it in an IDE.
com.alexandriasoftware.swing.action
EventListener for JSplitButton.
Simple implementation of a split button in Java Swing.
